svg.aria-label: The PID controller as three parallel blocks P, I, and D each fed the error and summed into one command, beside a step response showing the progression from P with offset to PI with overshoot to a clean precise PID converging on the target
svg.title: The PID controller as three parallel blocks P, I, and D each fed the error and summed into one command, beside a step response showing the progression from P with offset to PI with overshoot to a clean precise PID converging on the target
svg.text: The PID controller: three parallel actions → one command
P → PI → PID: offset removed, overshoot damped
